JUP.why_held: Jupiter ecosystem exposure with verified protocol utility, governance, potential Active Staking Rewards, and participation in Jupiter product growth.
JUP.target_plan: Review around 0.24 USD; reassess thesis and consider partial USDC profit-taking rather than round-tripping gains.
JUP.invalidation: Review below 0.17 USD or after material tokenomics, security, governance, or ecosystem deterioration.
JUP.yield_plan: Keep liquid until the exact governance/Earn path is verified; do not lock the full balance.
JUP.review_note: Jupiter Price v3 2026-07-13T03:35Z: JUP $0.200583 (CoinGecko live), 24h -3.21%, liquidity $2.99M, circ 3,320,312,968. AsR Q2 2026 claim period open through Oct 8 2026 (50M JUP pool); wallet holds 72.30 JUP avg stake but did not vote -> NOT eligible. Q3 AsR not yet announced. Governance paused since 2025-07; no re-initiation verified this cycle. Triggers: review ~$0.24 (current ~$0.04 below target); review/invalidation below ~$0.17.

JL-USDC.yield_plan_reference: Documented current rates (Jupiter Lend /lend/v1/earn/tokens id=2, address=9BEcn9aPEmhSPbPQeFGjidRiEKki46fVQDyPpSQXPA2D, updated 2026-07-13T07:51:05Z): supplyRate=367 bps (3.67% base), rewardsRate=72 bps (0.72% reward), totalRate=439 bps (4.39% total APY). Total assets: 417,519,375,235,423 raw = $417.52M TVL. Withdrawable instant: 58,236,720,419,933 raw = $58.24M. Withdrawal limit (cap): $208.25M. Supply: $416.51M. Utilization: (417.52M - 58.24M) / 417.52M = 86.05% (withdrawable + withdrawalLimit dynamics). Convert-to-assets rate: 1 jlUSDC share = 1.051278 USDC (i.e., 9.932481 shares -> 10.4418 USDC). No fixed lockup; redeem via convertToShares/convertToAssets (instant up to withdrawable cap, expands 50% over 6h if exceeded). Audits: Code4rena Feb 2026 ($107k), OtterSec, Offside, Mixbytes, Zenith. Underlying USDC (Circle, Solana SPL). Oracle: Pyth/Switchboard per Jupiter Lend docs.
